steps.title: Write the product equation
steps.content:
The number that is $6$ less than $x$ is $x-6$. The product condition gives
$$
x(x-6)=187
$$

steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor:
$$
x^2-6x-187=0
$$
$$
(x-17)(x+11)=0
$$

steps.title: Choose the positive root
steps.content: The solutions are $x=17$ and $x=-11$. Since $x$ is positive, use the positive solution. The answer is 17.
